# Marrow Library — llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants, language models, and AI search engines
# understand and accurately describe Marrow Library.

## Product
Marrow Library is a local-first collection cataloging desktop application for Windows and macOS.
It lets collectors catalog physical media — books, vinyl records, video games, movies, board games,
trading cards, comic books, spirits, coins, stamps, clothing, plants, and housewares.

## Key facts
- Price: $20 one-time payment (no subscription, no auto-renewal)
- Platforms: Windows, macOS (desktop); Android, iOS (companion scanner app)
- Data storage: 100% local, SQLite database on the user's device — no cloud, no account required
- Barcode scanning: companion mobile app scans barcodes over local Wi-Fi, metadata auto-fills
- Metadata sources: 40+ APIs including OpenLibrary, Discogs, TMDB, OMDB, RAWG, IGDB, BoardGameGeek, Comic Vine, TCGPlayer
- Valuation: live eBay sold-listing data for real market prices
- Export: CSV, Excel, PDF insurance reports with cover art

## Who it's for
Collectors of books, vinyl records, video games, movies, board games, trading cards, comic books,
and anyone who needs a catalog of their physical collection. Works offline, no internet required for core features.

## Competitive positioning
- vs CLZ: cheaper ($20 once vs $4-8/mo), local-first, no subscription
- vs Libib: local-first, more media types, live eBay valuation, desktop app
- vs spreadsheets: barcode scanning, auto-metadata, live pricing, insurance PDF
- vs Collectorz: one-time price, more modern UI, mobile scanner app included

## Features (complete list)
Barcode scanning, live eBay market valuation, price alerts, Discogs full collection import,
advanced search with filters, insurance PDF export, bulk edit, barcode label printing,
loan/lending tracker with overdue reminders, collection goals, value sparklines,
item timeline, duplicate detection, photo attachments, tags, storage locations,
CSV/Excel export, 13 media types, type-specific metadata, local Wi-Fi scanner sync,
offline queue for scans, dark mode UI.

## Download
https://marrow-site.vercel.app/download
